method: Hybrid v26 feasibility test for a late low-progress timeout / scratch exit. The branch exits only if a trade has already lasted a long time, has still made too little best-so-far progress, and current unrealized PnL remains no better than a small retained cap.

qc_v26_low_progress_diagnostic.late_low_progress_definition: duration >= 240 minutes and MFE < $50 and final PnL < $50

structural_conclusion.qc_observation: Accepted v26 trades still contain a meaningful cluster of long-duration, low-progress trades with negative average outcomes.
structural_conclusion.research_interpretation: That makes low-progress timeout exits a materially different branch from both late washout exits and early fast-failure aborts.
structural_conclusion.next_step_rule: Do not launch a QC candidate unless this branch improves local full-sample PnL and at least 2/4 walk-forward folds.
